overview: Cenegenics provides precision health diagnostics and personalized age management through in-home biomarker testing (100+ markers) and physician-led assessments. The program uses data-driven analysis to optimize healthspan and improve longevity markers.
highlights: In-home phlebotomy service with 100+ biomarker baseline measurements
Full-day performance health assessment with direct physician review
Dedicated team including physician, performance health coach, and coordinator
targetAudience: Individuals seeking proactive health optimization and longevity support through preventive, data-driven medicine rather than traditional disease treatment.
